case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ARLINDO MENDES LEAL JUNIOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEAL JUNIOR, ARLINDO MENDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-27-1990, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEAL JUNIOR, ARLINDO MENDES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARLINDO MENDES LEAL JUNIOR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAL JUNIOR, ARLINDO MENDES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
